column1: # Synthetic starter data - fictional applicants used as validation scenarios.
# These are NOT real people. They mirror the built-in test suite in the app
# (LA_SCENARIOS) and exercise every branch of the eligibility rules engine.

column7: Category (a)-(g) qualifies regardless of income even though income exceeds Delhi ceiling
No category but income within default 300000 ceiling under S.12(h)
No category and income above Delhi 100000 ceiling
Senior citizen is a state-scheme category - confirm with SLSA
No income entered and no category - needs more information
Person in custody is income-blind under S.12(g)
Multiple categories - both S.12(c) and S.12(d) apply
Income exactly at the default ceiling boundary (<= is eligible)
One rupee above the default ceiling - not income-eligible
